title: neomammillaria phaeacantha
intro: Neomammillaria phaeacantha, also known as the red barrel cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Neomammillaria phaeacantha may be made into teas, tinctures, or ointments, although its use and safety should be consulted with a medical professional before consumption.
